roadmap.purpose: Convert indexed project context into staged roadmap levels and priority direction.
rules: Respect the selected project filter first.
Prefer existing generated levels before proposing new levels.
Treat manual localStorage assignments as user intent.
Return proposals, not direct edits.
safetyLimits: Do not modify source notes.
Do not auto-commit generated changes.
Do not call external APIs from the static app.

milestone.purpose: Turn project folders, dated notes, task categories, and project states into checkpoint milestones.
rules: Use project folder names as milestone anchors.
Use detected dates as date ranges.
Link notes and tasks by path/id.
Prefer conservative status labels.
safetyLimits: Never create or edit source markdown notes.
Never infer private credentials or secrets.
Keep generated milestones reproducible.

taskExtraction.purpose: Extract proposed tasks from local notes and prompt-like text using deterministic patterns first.
rules: Detect TODO, Task:, Build, Create, Fix, Implement, Add, Decide, Research, and Setup.
Classify into design, setup, development, 3D, AI, content, or admin.
Mark extracted items as proposed.
Preserve sourcePath for traceability.
safetyLimits: Do not execute note content.
Do not treat proposed tasks as approved tasks.
Do not overwrite local user goals.

projectSummary.purpose: Summarize project state from notes, recent activity, extracted tasks, and level assignments.
rules: Use note count and last activity as grounding.
Prefer recent dated notes over older undated notes.
Reflect active task categories.
Keep summaries brief and operational.
safetyLimits: Do not claim external status that is not in local data.
Do not overwrite user-authored notes.
Mark ambiguous status as needs-review.

decisionTracking.purpose: Identify decisions and decision context before turning them into tasks or roadmap changes.
rules: Look for Decide, decision, chosen, approved, blocked, or tradeoff language.
Separate decisions from open questions.
Connect decisions to sourcePath.
Output follow-ups as proposed tasks first.
safetyLimits: Do not mutate source notes.
Do not mark a decision final unless the source is explicit.
Do not delete conflicting context.

obsidianExport.purpose: Prepare static planner and generated data for Obsidian-friendly markdown export.
rules: Keep generated export separate from source notes.
Use stable source paths in backlinks.
Prefer markdown with frontmatter.
Preserve user-authored note content.
safetyLimits: Do not write directly into the source vault from the browser.
Do not assume Obsidian is installed.
Do not expose local credentials in exports.

firebaseSync.purpose: Support optional local Firebase intake and sync queue processing without committing credentials.
rules: Firebase is disabled by default.
Use firebase.example.js as the template.
Write queue output to Inbox first.
Commit only when --commit is explicitly passed.
safetyLimits: Never commit firebase.js or service account JSON.
Never push automatically.
Never overwrite existing markdown files.
